headline: Chamath Palihapitiya Says AI Costs At Startup 8090 Could Hit $10 Million A Year: 'Our Costs Have More Than Tripled'
summary: AI costs surge for startup 8090 as Chamath Palihapitiya warns of inefficient usage and expensive tools like Cursor.
